title: 30o: blob_lookup hardcodes r1 not CALL_ID
description: crates/jmap-chat/src/methods/blob.rs: blob_lookup() builds its JmapRequest inline and uses a hardcoded literal "r1" for the call-id instead of the CALL_ID constant defined in methods/mod.rs. The reason is that build_request() bakes in chat_using() (jmap:chat), while blob_lookup needs jmap:blob2. The request construction should at minimum reference CALL_ID to make the coupling explicit and avoid silent drift if the constant ever changes.
close_reason: fixed as part of 30o.11: now uses super::CALL_ID
